phone_presence_notes: Chris maintained a professional tone and handled the complex long-distance logistics confidently, but used the customer's name only once and warmth was limited.
top_strength: Outstanding estimate and logistics explanation — drove through loading time, 4.5hr drive time, unload time, and full two-day cost model clearly.
coaching_note: Consistently skipping 3 key differentiators and Save Your Ass — no call can reach mastery without those sections.
